  'admin@intradaydash.com',
  '$2b$10$N9qo8uLOickgx2ZMRZoMyeIjZAgcg7b3XeKeUxWdeS86E36P4/KFm',
  'Admin',
  'admin',
  'password',
  'premium',
  1,
  NOW(),
  NOW(),
  NOW()
) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE role = 'admin', subscriptionTier = 'premium', onboardingCompleted = 1;

SELECT id, email, name, role, subscriptionTier FROM users WHERE email = 'admin@intradaydash.com';
